rationale: All derivatives metrics (funding rate, open interest) and correlation coefficients for NOT require either Coinglass Pro/paid tier, exchange API keys, or custom statistical computation against NASDAQ time-series — none of which are accessible via the free public endpoints available at this time.
sources: https://www.coinglass.com/en/coins/notcoin — funding rate & OI pages exist but real-time granular data requires login/paid tier
https://www.coingecko.com/en/coins/notcoin — price/volume data available but 30d correlation coefficients vs BTC/ETH/NASDAQ are NOT pre-computed and served freely
https://alternative.me/ — does not cover NOT derivatives or correlation data
https://fred.stlouisfed.org/ — NASDAQ index data available but pairing/computing correlation with NOT requires custom calculation not served as a free endpoint
